title: tephrocactus leoninus
intro: Tephrocactus leoninus, also known as the lion's tail, is a type of cactus that belongs to the Echinocactaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tephrocactus leoninus include treating various skin conditions such as wounds, burns, and eczema, as well as providing relief from fever and cough. Herbal preparations of Tephrocactus leoninus can be made into salves, ointments, or infusions, which can be applied topically or consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
